headline: Maple Gold Announces Early Exercise of Warrants by Michael Gentile
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - March 19, 2026) - Maple Gold Mines Ltd. (TSXV: MGM) (OTCQX: MGMLF) (FSE: M3G0) ("Maple Gold" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that it has received total proceeds of $2,315,779.10 from the early exercise of 2,724,446 common share purchase warrants of the Company ("Warrants") by strategic investor Michael Gentile. Mr. Gentile's resulting ownership interest in the Company has increased from approximately 4.7% to approximately 8.4% on an...
